---
name: Use-case request
about: Describe a real workflow you want this repo to support
title: "[use-case] "
labels: ["use-case", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Goal
What outcome are you trying to achieve in one sentence?

## Current workflow
What are you doing today? Include tools and key steps.

## Where this repo should help
What part of your workflow should this project take over or simplify?

## Expected result
What does success look like? Be concrete (artifact, output shape, time saved, etc.).

## Constraints
Any constraints we should design around (OS, CI environment, security requirements, budget, offline-only, etc.)?

## Example input/output (optional)
If helpful, include a minimal example of input and desired output.
